stdout:
Table	Create Table
invoices	CREATE TABLE `invoices` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `invoice_number` varchar(32) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `type` enum('offer','invoice','credit_note') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'offer',
  `status` enum('draft','sent','accepted','invoiced','paid','cancelled','overdue') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  `customer_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `project_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `sender_name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `sender_street` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `sender_zip` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `sender_city` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `sender_tax_id` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `sender_vat_id` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `sender_email` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `sender_phone` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `sender_iban` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `sender_bic` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `recipient_name` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `recipient_company` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `recipient_street` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `recipient_zip` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `recipient_city` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `recipient_email` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `issue_date` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `due_date` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `delivery_date` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `payment_terms` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT 'Zahlbar innerhalb von 14 Tagen ohne Abzug.',
  `tax_mode` enum('standard','reduced','mixed','tax_free','kleinunternehmer') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT 'standard',
  `subtotal_net` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT '0.00',
  `tax_amount` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT '0.00',
  `total_gross` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT '0.00',
  `currency` varchar(3) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT 'EUR',
  `intro_text` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `notes` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `footer_text` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `pdf_url` varchar(1024) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `pdf_key` varchar(512) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `content_hash` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `is_locked` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `cancelled_by` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `cancels_invoice` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` bigint DEFAULT NULL,
  `updated_at` bigint DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  UNIQUE KEY `invoice_number` (`invoice_number`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
